verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus ipsi David, quarta sabbati.   Deus ultionum Dominus ;  Deus ultionum libere egit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵל־נְקָמ֥וֹת יְהֹוָ֑ה אֵ֖ל נְקָמ֣וֹת הוֹפִֽיעַ׃
verses.king_james: O Lord God, to whom vengeance belongeth; O God, to whom vengeance belongeth, shew thyself.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaltare, qui judicas terram ;  redde retributionem superbis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִ֭נָּשֵׂא שֹׁפֵ֣ט הָאָ֑רֶץ הָשֵׁ֥ב גְּ֝מ֗וּל עַל־גֵּאִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Lift up thyself, thou judge of the earth: render a reward to the proud.

verses.latin_vulgate: Usquequo peccatores, Domine,  usquequo peccatores gloriabuntur ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־מָתַ֖י רְשָׁעִ֥ים ׀ יְהֹוָ֑ה עַד־מָ֝תַ֗י רְשָׁעִ֥ים יַעֲלֹֽזוּ׃
verses.king_james: Lord, how long shall the wicked, how long shall the wicked triumph?

verses.latin_vulgate: effabuntur et loquentur iniquitatem ;  loquentur omnes qui operantur injustitiam ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַבִּ֣יעוּ יְדַבְּר֣וּ עָתָ֑ק יִ֝תְאַמְּר֗וּ כׇּל־פֹּ֥עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.king_james: How long shall they utter and speak hard things? and all the workers of iniquity boast themselves?

verses.latin_vulgate: Populum tuum, Domine, humiliaverunt,  et hæreditatem tuam vexaverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַמְּךָ֣ יְהֹוָ֣ה יְדַכְּא֑וּ וְֽנַחֲלָתְךָ֥ יְעַנּֽוּ׃
verses.king_james: They break in pieces thy people, O Lord, and afflict thine heritage.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viduam et advenam interfecerunt,  et pupillos occiderunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַלְמָנָ֣ה וְגֵ֣ר יַהֲרֹ֑גוּ וִ֖יתוֹמִ֣ים יְרַצֵּֽחוּ׃
verses.king_james: They slay the widow and the stranger, and murder the fatherless.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixerunt : Non videbit Dominus,  nec intelliget Deus Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֭יֹּ֣אמְרוּ לֹ֣א יִרְאֶה־יָּ֑הּ וְלֹא־יָ֝בִ֗ין אֱלֹהֵ֥י יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.king_james: Yet they say, The Lord shall not see, neither shall the God of Jacob regard it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Intelligite, insipientes in populo ;  et stulti, aliquando sapite.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּ֭ינוּ בֹּעֲרִ֣ים בָּעָ֑ם וּ֝כְסִילִ֗ים מָתַ֥י תַּשְׂכִּֽילוּ׃
verses.king_james: Understand, ye brutish among the people: and ye fools, when will ye be wise?

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui plantavit aurem non audiet ?  aut qui finxit oculum non considerat ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲנֹ֣טַֽע אֹ֭זֶן הֲלֹ֣א יִשְׁמָ֑ע אִֽם־יֹ֥צֵֽר עַ֝֗יִן הֲלֹ֣א יַבִּֽיט׃
verses.king_james: He that planted the ear, shall he not hear? he that formed the eye, shall he not see?

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui corripit gentes non arguet,  qui docet hominem scientiam ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲיֹסֵ֣ר גּ֭וֹיִם הֲלֹ֣א יוֹכִ֑יחַ הַֽמְלַמֵּ֖ד אָדָ֣ם דָּֽעַת׃
verses.king_james: He that chastiseth the heathen, shall not he correct? he that teacheth man knowledge, shall not he know?

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus scit cogitationes hominum,  quoniam vanæ sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה יֹ֭דֵעַ מַחְשְׁב֣וֹת אָדָ֑ם כִּי־הֵ֥מָּה הָֽבֶל׃
verses.king_james: The Lord knoweth the thoughts of man, that they are vanity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus homo quem tu erudieris, Domine,  et de lege tua docueris eum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׁרֵ֤י ׀ הַגֶּ֣בֶר אֲשֶׁר־תְּיַסְּרֶ֣נּוּ יָּ֑הּ וּֽמִתּוֹרָתְךָ֥ תְלַמְּדֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: Blessed is the man whom thou chastenest, O Lord, and teachest him out of thy law;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut mitiges ei a diebus malis,  donec fodiatur peccatori fovea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְהַשְׁקִ֣יט ל֭וֹ מִ֣ימֵי רָ֑ע עַ֤ד יִכָּרֶ֖ה לָרָשָׁ֣ע שָֽׁחַת׃
verses.king_james: That thou mayest give him rest from the days of adversity, until the pit be digged for the wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia non repellet Dominus plebem suam,  et hæreditatem suam non derelinquet,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹא־יִטֹּ֣שׁ יְהֹוָ֣ה עַמּ֑וֹ וְ֝נַחֲלָת֗וֹ לֹ֣א יַעֲזֹֽב׃
verses.king_james: For the Lord will not cast off his people, neither will he forsake his inheritance.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoadusque justitia convertatur in judicium :  et qui juxta illam, omnes qui recto sunt corde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־עַד־צֶ֭דֶק יָשׁ֣וּב מִשְׁפָּ֑ט וְ֝אַחֲרָ֗יו כׇּל־יִשְׁרֵי־לֵֽב׃
verses.king_james: But judgment shall return unto righteousness: and all the upright in heart shall follow it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis consurget mihi adversus malignantes ?  aut quis stabit mecum adversus operantes iniquitatem ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִֽי־יָק֣וּם לִ֭י עִם־מְרֵעִ֑ים מִי־יִתְיַצֵּ֥ב לִ֝֗י עִם־פֹּ֥עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.king_james: Who will rise up for me against the evildoers? or who will stand up for me against the workers of iniquity?

verses.latin_vulgate: Nisi quia Dominus adjuvit me,  paulominus habitasset in inferno anima mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לוּלֵ֣י יְ֭הֹוָה עֶזְרָ֣תָה לִּ֑י כִּמְעַ֓ט ׀ שָׁכְנָ֖ה דוּמָ֣ה נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: Unless the Lord had been my help, my soul had almost dwelt in silence.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si dicebam : Motus est pes meus :  misericordia tua, Domine, adjuvabat me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־אָ֭מַרְתִּי מָ֣טָה רַגְלִ֑י חַסְדְּךָ֥ יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה יִסְעָדֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: When I said, My foot slippeth; thy mercy, O Lord, held me up.

verses.latin_vulgate: Secundum multitudinem dolorum meorum in corde meo,  consolationes tuæ lætificaverunt animam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּרֹ֣ב שַׂרְעַפַּ֣י בְּקִרְבִּ֑י תַּ֝נְחוּמֶ֗יךָ יְֽשַׁעַשְׁע֥וּ נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: In the multitude of my thoughts within me thy comforts delight my soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid adhæret tibi sedes iniquitatis,  qui fingis laborem in præcepto ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַֽ֭יְחׇבְרְךָ כִּסֵּ֣א הַוּ֑וֹת יֹצֵ֖ר עָמָ֣ל עֲלֵי־חֹֽק׃
verses.king_james: Shall the throne of iniquity have fellowship with thee, which frameth mischief by a law?

verses.latin_vulgate: Captabunt in animam justi,  et sanguinem innocentem condemnabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֭גוֹדּוּ עַל־נֶ֣פֶשׁ צַדִּ֑יק וְדָ֖ם נָקִ֣י יַרְשִֽׁיעוּ׃
verses.king_james: They gather themselves together against the soul of the righteous, and condemn the innocent blood.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factus est mihi Dominus in refugium,  et Deus meus in adjutorium spei meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֬י יְהֹוָ֣ה לִ֣י לְמִשְׂגָּ֑ב וֵ֝אלֹהַ֗י לְצ֣וּר מַחְסִֽי׃
verses.king_james: But the Lord is my defence; and my God is the rock of my refuge.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et reddet illis iniquitatem ipsorum,  et in malitia eorum disperdet eos :  disperdet illos Dominus Deus noster.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֤שֶׁב עֲלֵיהֶ֨ם ׀ אֶת־אוֹנָ֗ם וּבְרָעָתָ֥ם יַצְמִיתֵ֑ם יַ֝צְמִיתֵ֗ם יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And he shall bring upon them their own iniquity, and shall cut them off in their own wickedness; yea, the Lord our God shall cut them off.
